mapper.sql: AA.TYPE_SEQ , AA.GRP_CODE , AA.CODE , AA.CODE_NM_KO , AA.CODE_NM_EN , AA.INPT_TYPE , AA.USE_YN , AA.SORT_ORD , AA.RGTR , TO_CHAR(AA.RGT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RGT_DTTM , AA.CHNR , TO_CHAR(AA.CHNG_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHNG_DTTM

sql.if: AND ( REPLACE(UPPER(BB.CODE_NAME), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{allSrch, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' OR REPLACE(UPPER(AA.CODE_NM_KO), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{allSrch, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' OR REPLACE(UPPER(AA.CODE_NM_EN), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{allSrch, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' )

mapper.select:
/* com.erns.coching.rawType.mapper.RawTypeDAO.getListCount */
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_CM_RAW_TYPE AA INNER JOIN T_CODE_INF BB ON AA.GRP_CODE = BB.CODE AND BB.GRP_CODE ='CH001'
